db:insert.doc:name: INSERT user
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, password, role, active) VALUES (:id, :name, :email, :password, :role, true)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.newUserId, name: vars.body.name default 'Usuario', email: vars.body.email, password: vars.passHash, role: vars.body.role default 'student' }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT user creado
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, role, active, created_at FROM users WHERE id = :id

db:select.doc:name: SELECT por email
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, password, role, active FROM users WHERE email = :e LIMIT 1

set-payload.doc:name: Respuesta login

db:select.doc:name: LIST users
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, role, active, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC

db:select.doc:name: SELECT user
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, role, active, created_at FROM users WHERE id = :id

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE user con password
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE users SET name = :name, email = :email, role = :role, active = :active, password = :password WHERE id = :id
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: attributes.uriParams.userId, name: vars.body.name, email: vars.body.email, role: vars.body.role, active: vars.body.active default true, password: vars.passHash }]

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE user sin password
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE users SET name = :name, email = :email, role = :role, active = :active WHERE id = :id
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: attributes.uriParams.userId, name: vars.body.name, email: vars.body.email, role: vars.body.role, active: vars.body.active default true }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT user actualizado
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, role, active, created_at FROM users WHERE id = :id

db:update.doc:name: Soft delete
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE users SET active = false WHERE id = :id

db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, role, active, created_at FROM users WHERE id = :id

db:select.doc:name: Matrículas + cursos
db:select.db:sql: SELECT e.id AS enrollment_id, e.status, e.enrollment_date, c.id AS course_id, c.title, c.category, c.duration_hours, c.price, c.currency FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE e.user_id = :uid ORDER BY e.enrollment_date DESC
SELECT er.id, er.enrollment_id, er.course_id, er.grade, er.passed, er.created_at FROM evaluation_results er JOIN enrollments en ON er.enrollment_id = en.id WHERE en.user_id = :uid
SELECT id, enrollment_id, course_id, grade, issued_at FROM certificates WHERE user_id = :uid ORDER BY issued_at DESC

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { user: vars.u, enrollments: vars.enrs default [], evaluations: vars.grades default [], certificates: vars.certs default [] }]
set-payload.doc:name: Historial compuesto

db:select.doc:name: LIST courses
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM courses WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT course
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO courses (id, title, description, instructor_id, instructor_name, category, duration_hours, price, currency, active) VALUES (:id, :title, :description, :instructor_id, :instructor_name, :category, :duration_hours, :price, :currency, true)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.cid, title: vars.c.title, description: vars.c.description default null, instructor_id: vars.c.instructor_id, instructor_name: vars.c.instructor_name default null, category: vars.c.category default null, duration_hours: vars.c.duration_hours default null, price: vars.c.price default 0, currency: vars.c.currency default 'EUR' }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT course
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM courses WHERE id = :id

db:select.doc:name: SELECT course
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM courses WHERE id = :id

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE course
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE courses SET title=:title, description=:description, instructor_id=:instructor_id, instructor_name=:instructor_name, category=:category, duration_hours=:duration_hours, price=:price, currency=:currency, active=:active, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=:id
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: attributes.uriParams.courseId, title: vars.c.title, description: vars.c.description, instructor_id: vars.c.instructor_id, instructor_name: vars.c.instructor_name, category: vars.c.category, duration_hours: vars.c.duration_hours, price: vars.c.price, currency: vars.c.currency default 'EUR', active: vars.c.active default true }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT course
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM courses WHERE id = :id

db:update.doc:name: Soft delete curso
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE courses SET active = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = :id

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- [ { externalId: 'LEG-001', title: 'Contenido legacy: Fundamentos XML', description: 'Importado del repositorio heredado', category: 'Legacy', duration_hours: 5, price: 19.99, instructor_id: '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', instructor_name: 'Profesor Demo', checksum: 'chk-001' }, { externalId: 'LEG-002', title: 'Contenido legacy: SOAP avanzado', description: 'Metadatos sincronizados', category: 'Legacy', duration_hours: 8, price: 29.99, instructor_id: '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', instructor_name: 'Profesor Demo', checksum: 'chk-002' } ]]
set-payload.doc:name: Metadatos simulados legacy

db:select.doc:name: ¿Existe por external?
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id FROM courses WHERE external_content_id = :ext LIMIT 1

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT desde legacy
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO courses (id, title, description, instructor_id, instructor_name, category, duration_hours, price, currency, active, external_content_id, external_last_modified, external_checksum) VALUES (:id, :title, :description, :instructor_id, :instructor_name, :category, :duration_hours, :price, 'EUR', true, :ext_id, NOW(), :checksum)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: uuid(), title: vars.legacyItem.title, description: vars.legacyItem.description, instructor_id: vars.legacyItem.instructor_id, instructor_name: vars.legacyItem.instructor_name, category: vars.legacyItem.category, duration_hours: vars.legacyItem.duration_hours, price: vars.legacyItem.price, ext_id: vars.legacyItem.externalId, checksum: vars.legacyItem.checksum }]

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE desde legacy
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE courses SET title=:title, description=:description, category=:category, duration_hours=:duration_hours, price=:price, external_last_modified=NOW(), external_checksum=:checksum, updated_at=NOW() WHERE external_content_id = :ext_id
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ title: vars.legacyItem.title, description: vars.legacyItem.description, category: vars.legacyItem.category, duration_hours: vars.legacyItem.duration_hours, price: vars.legacyItem.price, checksum: vars.legacyItem.checksum, ext_id: vars.legacyItem.externalId }]

db:insert.doc:name: Log sincronización OK
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO legacy_sync_log (id, operation, status, detail) VALUES (:id, 'SYNC_CATALOG', 'OK', :detail)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: uuid(), detail: 'Sincronización simulada desde LegacyConnector' }]

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT enrollment
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO enrollments (id, user_id, course_id, status) VALUES (:id, :user_id, :course_id, 'ACTIVE')
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.eid, user_id: vars.e.userId, course_id: vars.e.courseId }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT enrollment
db:select.db:sql: SELECT e.*, u.name AS user_name, c.title AS course_title FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id=u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id=c.id WHERE e.id = :id

db:select.doc:name: SELECT enrollment
db:select.db:sql: SELECT e.*, u.name AS user_name, c.title AS course_title FROM enrollments e JOIN users u ON e.user_id=u.id JOIN courses c ON e.course_id=c.id WHERE e.id = :id

db:update.doc:name: Cancelar matrícula
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE enrollments SET status='CANCELLED' WHERE id=:id

set-payload.doc:name: Preguntas demo

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { received: true, enrollmentId: payload.enrollmentId, answersCount: sizeOf(payload.answers default []) }]
set-payload.doc:name: ACK respuestas

db:select.doc:name: Matrícula y curso
db:select.db:sql: SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.course_id, e.status FROM enrollments e WHERE e.id = :eid

set-payload.doc:name: Calcular nota

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT evaluation_results
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO evaluation_results (id, enrollment_id, course_id, grade, passed, answers_json) VALUES (:id, :eid, :cid, :grade, :passed, :answers)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: uuid(), eid: vars.req.enrollmentId, cid: vars.en.course_id, grade: vars.calc.grade, passed: vars.calc.passed, answers: write(vars.req.answers default [], 'application/json') }]

db:update.doc:name: Marcar curso completado si aprobado
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE enrollments SET status = IF(:passed, 'COMPLETED', status) WHERE id = :eid

db:select.doc:name: SELECT nota
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, enrollment_id, course_id, grade, passed, created_at FROM evaluation_results WHERE enrollment_id = :eid

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT email_log
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO email_log (id, recipient_email, subject, body, notification_type, status, related_user_id, sent_at) VALUES (:id, :to, :subject, :body, COALESCE(:ntype,'OTHER'), 'SENT', :uid, NOW())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.nid, to: payload.to, subject: payload.subject, body: payload.body default '', ntype: payload.notificationType, uid: payload.userId default null }]

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT email matrícula
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO email_log (id, recipient_email, subject, body, notification_type, status, related_user_id, sent_at) VALUES (:id, :to, :subject, :body, 'ENROLLMENT', 'SENT', :uid, NOW())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.nid, to: payload.email, subject: 'Confirmación de matrícula', body: payload.message default 'Matrícula registrada', uid: payload.userId default null }]

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT email certificado
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO email_log (id, recipient_email, subject, body, notification_type, status, related_user_id, sent_at) VALUES (:id, :to, :subject, :body, 'CERTIFICATE', 'SENT', :uid, NOW())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.nid, to: payload.email, subject: 'Certificado disponible', body: payload.message default 'Certificado generado', uid: payload.userId default null }]

db:select.doc:name: SELECT usuario activo
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, active FROM users WHERE id = :id AND active = true

db:select.doc:name: SELECT curso activo
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, title, price, currency, active FROM courses WHERE id = :id AND active = true

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT payment PENDING
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO payments (id, user_id, course_id, amount, currency, status, external_ref) VALUES (:id, :uid, :cid, :amount, :cur, 'PENDING', :eref)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.pid, uid: vars.pay.userId, cid: vars.pay.courseId, amount: vars.paymentAmount, cur: vars.paymentCurrency, eref: vars.externalRef }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { paymentId: vars.pid, status: 'PENDING', externalRef: vars.externalRef, userId: vars.pay.userId, courseId: vars.pay.courseId, amount: vars.paymentAmount, currency: vars.paymentCurrency }]
set-payload.doc:name: Respuesta proceso

db:select.doc:name: SELECT payment PENDING
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, user_id, course_id, amount, currency, status, external_ref FROM payments WHERE id=:id AND status='PENDING'

validation:is-true.message: Pago no encontrado o no pendiente
validation:is-true.doc:name: Existe pago pendiente

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE CONFIRMED
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE payments SET status='CONFIRMED', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=:id AND status='PENDING'

db:select.doc:name: SELECT payment
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, user_id, course_id, amount, currency, status, external_ref FROM payments WHERE id=:id

db:update.doc:name: UPDATE CANCELLED
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE payments SET status='CANCELLED', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=:id
